response.justification: While the candidate has strong experience in software development, distributed systems, and technical mentoring across multiple Staff-level roles, they severely lack the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience. Their background is heavily skewed towards web and full-stack technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, DLang) rather than the low-level cloud compute platform infrastructure required for this role.
strengths: Demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring through Staff Engineer roles and organizing technical workshops.
Experience building and scaling distributed systems and microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Strong background in establishing engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
concerns: Fails the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming, possessing less than a year of professional C++ experience.
Technical stack is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than core cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks deep, large-scale hardware architecture or low-level storage and compute technology expertise.
